---
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

<!-- ai-toolchain-version: v1.5.0 -->
<!-- last-verified: 2026-05-07 -->

# Markdown Styling Rules

- Use ATX-style headers (`#`, `##`, etc.) — not Setext (underlines).
- Include `<!-- last-verified: YYYY-MM-DD -->` comment near the top of every generated doc.
- Use tables for structured data; prefer flat lists over deeply nested structures.
- Use fenced code blocks with language identifiers (` ```json `, ` ```typescript `).
- Keep lines under 120 characters where practical.
- Use relative paths for cross-references within the repo.
